title: Flora's Delight
description: Addon for Farmer's Delight that adds new Flowers, Fruits, build your own pizza, Cheese, and other Foods!
body:
![Flora's Delight Logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c197a0ccab3365d271a8b8cd7b66eb5efdf2e7fb.png)

# Flora's delight
## About
**Flora's Delight is a addon to the [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) mod. It adds new flowers, plants, fruits, and more meals to minecraft.**

## Content
- Pizza that you can build your own and put multiple toppings on in any order!
- More Fruits such as Grapes, Strawberries, Olives, and Pineapples.
- Cheese and many meals containing it.
- More flowers and plants such as Buttercups, Lavender, Marigolds, Roses, Clovers, and More!
- New foliage for neglected biomes.
- New cauldron that allows you to mix potions in it.
- More Meals and Feasts for you to eat.
